2 years of enterprise experience at ADP (Fortune 250) across HR/HCM system implementation, technical configuration, client support, and data/reporting analysis on UKG Pro, Workforce Central and Kronos. Oct 2023 – Jun 2025  ·  1.9 yrs
Consultant — HCM/WFM Systems
Automatic Data Processing (ADP)  ·  Hyderabad  ·  Fortune 250  ·  UKG Pro · WFC · Kronos
  • Led requirements gathering and hands-on system configuration for HR/HCM platform implementations from scratch — People Record setup, 7-level labour account structures, and Genie reporting views.
  • Delivered end-to-end on-premises to GCP cloud migrations for enterprise UKG Pro environments, achieving zero data loss and 100% data integrity across all migration cycles.

  • Delivered enterprise client support across WFC, Workforce Ready and Workforce Dimensions — resolving timekeeping, payroll and configuration issues via phone, email and chat, including US shift coverage.
